#  Edit a Drawing Set's Name or Date 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' permissions on the Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
##### Edit Individually from the Drawing Sets Page
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click Drawing Sets.
  3. Edit the drawing set's name and date by clicking in the appropriate fields.
Note: Field will be updated automatically


##### Edit in a List from the Configure Settings Page
  1. Click **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15).
  2. On the Drawing Log Settings page, view the 'Edit Drawing Sets' section.
  3. Click on the name or the date of a set to make changes.  
![Edit Drawing Set Name](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/03da50ffd993bdd3e9036e01842e14cf/92a01102b2f5e5f17b83439742046270/edit-drawing-set-name.png?fm=webp)_  
Note:_ You can reorder sets by dragging them into a new order, or delete sets by clicking the **X** next to the set. For more information on deleting drawing sets, see [Delete a Drawing Set](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-a-drawing-set).


## See Also
